original_query: SELECT "NAME", CAST(SUM("CN") FILTER (WHERE "g_1") AS BIGINT), CAST(SUM("SM") FILTER (WHERE "g_2") AS INTEGER) FROM (SELECT "NAME", "CN", "SM", GROUPING("NAME", "CN", "SM") = 1 AS "g_1", GROUPING("NAME", "CN", "SM") = 2 AS "g_2" FROM (SELECT "NAME", COUNT(*) AS "CN", SUM("DEPTNO") AS "SM" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY "NAME") AS "t3" GROUP BY GROUPING SETS(("NAME", "CN"), ("NAME", "SM"))) AS "t5" GROUP BY "NAME"
rewritten_query: SELECT "NAME", CAST(SUM("CN") FILTER (WHERE "g_1") AS BIGINT), CAST(SUM("SM") FILTER (WHERE "g_2") AS INTEGER) FROM (SELECT "NAME", "CN", "SM", GROUPING("NAME", "CN", "SM") = 1 AS "g_1", GROUPING("NAME", "CN", "SM") = 2 AS "g_2" FROM (SELECT "NAME", COUNT(*) AS "CN", SUM("DEPTNO") AS "SM" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY "NAME") AS "t3" GROUP BY GROUPING SETS(("NAME", "CN"), ("NAME", "SM"))) AS "t5" GROUP BY "NAME"
